attacking_style: Breakaway specialist who commits to long-distance efforts, targeting intermediate points rather than stage wins. Willing to negotiate points distribution with breakaway companions.
team_tactics: Operates independently in breakaways with minimal visible team support. Engages in tactical agreements with other breakaway riders to divide spoils (KOM, intermediate sprints).
terrain_preference: Suited to breakaway-friendly stages where intermediate points are available. Not equipped for finale victories when peloton brings back the break.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing speed when caught by peloton or stronger breakaway companions. Unable to convert breakaway presence into stage victories despite accumulating significant distance.
key_patterns: Accumulates extreme breakaway distances (500km+ cumulative) across Grand Tours, prioritizing visibility over results.
Targets intermediatesprints and minor classifications rather than stage wins in breakaways.
Negotiates pre-agreements with breakaway companions for points distribution, showing tactical pragmatism.
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistently achieves breakaway presence but without conversion to wins, suggesting stable role as breakaway workhorse
